Management Report / Informe para dirección

Professional bilingual PDF · ISO compliance summary · QRT Power branded

💡
What this report includes: ISO compliance KPIs · Status by standard · Open non-conformities · Upcoming review schedule · Recommendations · Sign-off block. Generated in English with the official QRT Power logo.
Configure report
Report contents
1.
Executive Summary
Overall compliance %, key metrics, period highlights
2.
ISO Status by Standard
Compliance % and progress for each active ISO
3.
Non-Conformities
Open NCs with severity, deadline, action plan
4.
Document Review Status
Overdue, upcoming, coverage stats
5.
Recommendations
Action plan for next period per ISO
6.
Sign-off Block

Share Access
Local Wi-Fi Share
Same network · No internet needed

Both Macs on the same Wi-Fi? Your dad opens the app in his browser — no install required.

Steps
1Open the IDEA folder in Finder on your Mac
2Double-click share.command
3Copy the URL shown (e.g. http://192.168.x.x:7799)
4Send the URL to your dad — he opens it in Safari or Chrome
AirDrop / iMessage
Send the file directly · Works anywhere

The entire app is a single index.html file. Send it to your dad and he opens it in any browser — no install, no server.

Steps
1Click Copy File Path below or find index.html in Finder
2Right-click → Share → AirDrop (or attach to iMessage)
3Dad opens the file in Safari on his MacBook — done!
Netlify Deploy
Permanent URL · Works from anywhere

Deploy to Netlify (free) and get a permanent link like qrt-hub.netlify.app — your dad bookmarks it and always has the latest version.

Steps
1Go to app.netlify.com → Add new site → Deploy manually
2Drag the IDEA folder into the deploy box
3Copy the URL and send it to your dad
Desktop App (.dmg)
Native Mac app · Best experience

Build the full Mac desktop app and send the .dmg installer to your dad via AirDrop or Google Drive. He double-clicks to install.

Terminal command
cd ~/Desktop/IDEA && npm run dist
Outputs to dist/ folder · Send the .dmg file
For Wi-Fi sharing, your Mac's local IP is: checking…
